scripts.worker:types: wrangler types worker-configuration.d.ts --env-interface WorkerBindings --include-runtime false --strict-vars false --env-file .dev.vars.example
scripts.check:worker-types: wrangler types worker-configuration.d.ts --env-interface WorkerBindings --include-runtime false --strict-vars false --env-file .dev.vars.example --check

API_KEYS.description: Optional public API keys. Leave empty to disable shared API authentication.

ADMIN_KEY.description: Single admin key for the account-pool WebUI and `/admin/accounts` API. Set one non-placeholder value before importing Gemini accounts.

GEMINI_BL.description: Gemini Web build label. Update only if upstream Gemini Web responses become empty after a frontend change.

GEMINI_ORIGIN.description: Upstream Gemini origin. Keep the default unless Cloudflare egress is rate-limited and you operate a compatible forwarding endpoint.

UPSTREAM_SOCKET.description: Prefer `cloudflare:sockets` upstream transport when available. Docker uses a separate `.env.docker.example` default of `false`.

DEFAULT_MODEL.description: Model used when a request omits `model`.

RETRY_ATTEMPTS.description: Upstream retry attempts. Minimum runtime value is `1`.

GEMINI_ACCOUNT_MAX_ATTEMPTS.description: Maximum distinct Gemini accounts attempted per logical request. Defaults to 10 and is naturally capped by the eligible pool.

GEMINI_ACCOUNT_REFRESH_INTERVAL_SEC.description: Successful-account session maintenance interval in seconds. Set 0 to disable.

GEMINI_ACCOUNT_CAPABILITY_TTL_SEC.description: Freshness window for account model capability snapshots.

GEMINI_ACCOUNT_CAPABILITY_MODE.description: Account capability routing mode: off, prefer, or strict.

RETRY_DELAY_SEC.description: Delay between upstream retry attempts in seconds.

REQUEST_BODY_MAX_BYTES.description: Maximum buffered JSON request body bytes. Workers default to 16 MiB; Docker Compose defaults to 64 MiB. Multipart image edits use their separate upload limit.

CURRENT_INPUT_FILE_ENABLED.description: Enable Gemini text attachments for large prompt context when an authenticated account-pool session is available.

CURRENT_INPUT_FILE_MIN_BYTES.description: Inline prompt byte threshold before text attachment handling is attempted.

CURRENT_INPUT_FILE_NAME.description: Filename used for large message context attachments.

CURRENT_TOOLS_FILE_NAME.description: Filename used for large tool-definition context attachments.
